title: 2 Men Convicted of Killing Malcolm X Will Be Exonerated After Decades
content: The 1966 convictions of the two men are expected to be thrown out after a lengthy investigation, validating long-held doubts about who killed the civil rights leader.

more_info.byline: By Ashley Southall and Jonah E. Bromwich

en_title: 2 Men Convicted of Killing Malcolm X Will Be Exonerated After Decades
en_content: The 1966 convictions of the two men are expected to be thrown out after a lengthy investigation, validating long-held doubts about who killed the civil rights leader.

title: As G.O.P. Fights Mask and Vaccine Mandates, Florida Takes the Lead
content: Florida lawmakers, at the request of Gov. Ron DeSantis, passed new laws sharply curtailing mask and vaccine mandates. Fringe anti-vaccination views met with little pushback.
en_title: As G.O.P. Fights Mask and Vaccine Mandates, Florida Takes the Lead
en_content: Florida lawmakers, at the request of Gov. Ron DeSantis, passed new laws sharply curtailing mask and vaccine mandates. Fringe anti-vaccination views met with little pushback.

en_content: The Biden administration will spend billions of dollars on a new plan to combat the pandemic, investing in antiviral pills, rapid tests and manufacturing.
